tasks.subject: Task 0: EpisodeSpec, aggregate_fitness, config lambda
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create the pure core — episode descriptor, mean-lambda*std aggregator, configurable lambda default — with no World dependency.

**Files:**
- Create: `src/blueball/ai/episodes.py`
- Modify: `src/blueball/config.py` (append after GA_ELITISM, line 116)
- Create: `tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] EpisodeSpec frozen+picklable: kind, seed, level_path, world_seed, max_steps, norm=1.0.
- [ ] aggregate_fitness([x], lam) returns x exactly.
- [ ] aggregate_fitness([10.0,20.0],0.5)==12.5.
- [ ] aggregate_fitness([], lam) raises ValueError.
- [ ] config.GA_FITNESS_STD_PENALTY==1.0.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -v` -> 6 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/ai/episodes.py", "src/blueball/config.py", "tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["EpisodeSpec frozen+picklable", "aggregate single score returns it exactly", "aggregate([10,20],0.5)==12.5", "empty scores raises ValueError", "config.GA_FITNESS_STD_PENALTY==1.0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 1: compute_level_par per-level normalizer
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the per-level fully-solved reference score that normalizes static levels so a big level doesn't dominate selection.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/ai/episodes.py` (add World/loader/collision imports + compute_level_par)
- Modify: `tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py` (append 3 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] compute_level_par(tutorial_hill) == total_width + 200.
- [ ] flat-only in-memory level -> par == total_width.
- [ ] empty-chunks level (par 0) -> returns 1.0.
- [ ] Accepts str path, Path, or dict.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -v` -> 9 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/ai/episodes.py", "tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["par(tutorial_hill)==width+200", "flat-only par==width", "empty level returns 1.0", "accepts path/Path/dict"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Episode-list constructors
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add the testable builders the CLIs use: deterministic multi-seed generation, infinite/static EpisodeSpec lists, and level-name -> path resolution.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/ai/episodes.py` (append constructors)
- Modify: `tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py` (append 5 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] generate_seeds(1234,1)==[1234].
- [ ] generate_seeds(1234,4) deterministic, base first, 4 distinct.
- [ ] infinite_episodes([1,2],...) -> 2 infinite specs, norm 1.0, level_path None.
- [ ] resolve_level_paths(["does_not_exist"]) raises ValueError mentioning Available.
- [ ] static_episodes([tutorial_hill_path],...) -> static spec norm==compute_level_par(path).

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -v` -> 14 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/ai/episodes.py", "tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["generate_seeds(1234,1)==[1234]", "generate_seeds deterministic base-first distinct", "infinite_episodes norm 1.0 level_path None", "resolve_level_paths unknown raises with Available", "static_episodes norm==compute_level_par"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: evaluate_episodes + multi-episode train() + run.json
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Wire the core into the trainer: picklable evaluate_episodes worker, backward-compatible episodes=/lam= on train(), and episodes/lam in run.json.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/ai/trainer.py` (imports asdict+Sequence; import EpisodeSpec+aggregate_fitness; add evaluate_episodes; restructure train() eval setup; extend finalize meta)
- Modify: `tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py` (append 5 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] evaluate_episodes single infinite spec == raw evaluate_infinite fitness.
- [ ] empty episode tuple raises ValueError.
- [ ] train(episodes=[...],ga_seed=0) twice -> byte-identical best_genome.
- [ ] multi-episode smoke: history len 3, finite stats, best_genome (510,) float32.
- [ ] Pool.imap matches serial map best_genome.
- [ ] Existing test_ai_smoke.py and test_genome_persistence.py stay green.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py tests/test_ai_smoke.py tests/test_genome_persistence.py -v` -> all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/ai/trainer.py", "tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py tests/test_ai_smoke.py tests/test_genome_persistence.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["evaluate_episodes single==raw evaluate_infinite", "empty episodes raises ValueError", "train(episodes) deterministic byte-identical", "multi-episode smoke history3 finite best(510,)float32", "Pool matches serial", "existing AI+persistence tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: run_dir_name multi-seed/multi-level variants
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend run-folder naming for multi-seed infinite (inf1234x3) and multi-level (lvls5) runs, keeping single-seed/single-level names unchanged.

**Files:**
- Modify: `src/blueball/ai/persistence.py` (run_dir_name)
- Modify: `tests/test_genome_persistence.py` (append 3 tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] run_dir_name(infinite_seed=1234,world_seed=1,timestamp="T") -> inf1234_w1_T (unchanged).
- [ ] num_seeds=3 -> inf1234x3_w1_T.
- [ ] num_levels=5 -> lvls5_w1_T.
- [ ] Existing run_dir_name tests stay green.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_genome_persistence.py -v` -> all pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["src/blueball/ai/persistence.py", "tests/test_genome_persistence.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_genome_persistence.py -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["single-seed name unchanged", "num_seeds=3 -> inf1234x3_w1_T", "num_levels=5 -> lvls5_w1_T", "existing tests green"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: train_infinite.py multi-seed CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend the headless infinite trainer with opt-in multi-seed (--seeds / --num-seeds), routing through multi-episode train(). Single-seed default unchanged aside from additive run.json fields.

**Files:**
- Modify: `train_infinite.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py` (append 1 subprocess test)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] --seeds 1,2,3 overrides --num-seeds; neither -> single base --infinite-seed.
- [ ] --num-seeds 2 writes one genomes/inf<seed>x2_w<ws>_<ts>/ with final_best.npy and run.json with 2 episodes, lam==1.0.
- [ ] Exit code 0 on success.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -k train_infinite_cli -v` -> passes

```json:metadata
{"files": ["train_infinite.py", "tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -k train_infinite_cli -v", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--seeds overrides --num-seeds; default single base seed", "--num-seeds 2 writes inf<seed>x2 folder + run.json 2 episodes lam 1.0", "exit code 0"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: train_levels.py static-level CLI
tasks.description:
**Goal:** New headless trainer that trains one generalist across a set of static levels (default all), per-level-normalized, persisting into a lvls<N>_... run folder.

**Files:**
- Create: `train_levels.py`
- Modify: `tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py` (append 2 subprocess tests)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] --levels tutorial_hill single level; default (no flag) trains all discoverable levels.
- [ ] Success writes one genomes/lvls<N>_w<ws>_<ts>/ with final_best.npy and run.json whose episodes are kind==static with norm>1.0.
- [ ] Unknown --levels name exits non-zero with message containing Available.

**Verify:** `pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -k train_levels_cli -v` -> passes; then `pytest -q` full suite green

```json:metadata
{"files": ["train_levels.py", "tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py"], "verifyCommand": "pytest -q tests/test_ai_multiepisode.py -k train_levels_cli -v && pytest -q", "acceptanceCriteria": ["--levels single + default all", "writes lvls<N> folder + run.json static episodes norm>1.0", "unknown level exits non-zero with Available", "full suite green"]}
```
